name: Eve
description: Eve is the main protagonist of the BIRDIE WING: Golf Girls' Story series. She is a survivor who made a living by betting on golf. Her struggling past resulted in a rough and powerful playing style. ~!In Part 2, it is revealed that Eve is the daughter of famed golfer Kazuhiko Amawashi and Elanor Burton, the daughter of the CEO of Arios, who both were victims of a tragic cruising accident which also resulted in Eve's amnesia!~

name: Inshun Hozoin
description: Originally named “Shinnosuke Mitsuda,” he witnessed the death of his father and mother Saya at the hands of a bandit at an early age. He was renamed to Inshun by In’ei. A child prodigy in spearmanship, Inshun withdrew within himself desiring to become stronger. By 15 he was the strongest at the temple. Realized the potential of Seijūrō at a young age when Yoshioka Kempō came to the Hōzōin temple. The second-generation master of the Hōzōin spear technique. (Wikipedia)

name: Izabella
description: The mother of reincarnated Anos. She cares for Anos, loving him constantly. She is married to Gusta. When Anos brings home Misha, Izabella is quick to jump the gun and assumes that Anos is together with Misha. She decides that is the case and supports it through and through.

name: Chitose Ikeda
description: __Height:__ 155cm Ikeda Chitose is a member of the student council. She is a helpful character whose extreme yuri fantasies make the yuri quotient of the story rise dramatically. While fantasizing, she removes her glasses to block her vision so she can concentrate, causing intense nose bleeds. She is really fond of the Ayano x Kyouko pairing. She speaks in soft Kansai dialect and likes tsukemono (pickled things).
